subcodes.first_line: O servant at the divine threshold! You had complained about the lack of a response to your letter. This is attributable to the fatigues of my journey
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی شکایت از عدم جواب نامه نموده بودی سبب خستگی راه و شدت تعب
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @business; financial; property matters, @suffering and imprisonment
